name: Carindale Property Trust
analysis: CDP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$5.5500, stop A$5.3361, target A$6.1917 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
